hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: The 10-point drop in 24 hours signals sellers are getting nervous about recession risk and macro tightening into year-end, pushing longer-dated crypto hedges higher as investors de-risk from cyclical bets. At 47.5%, the market is underpricing a real 2026 recession scenario where BTC could easily fall 40% from here, but it's also ignoring how hard it is to time a dip two years out when sentiment shifts are binary.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Just Got 10 Points Cheaper. Smart Money's Buying.
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin dip odds collapsed 10 points overnight to 47.5%, signaling the market abandoned its recession hedge narrative. But with 24 months of volatility runway and $1.5M in volume, this move screams overconfidence. At even odds, you're getting paid fairly for tail risk that institutional flows have already priced out.
